analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e class feature naming and structure. The feature clearly defines the number of spells known and references a list.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is clear, concise, and directly informs the player about the mechanic (choosing cantrips, learning more at higher levels via the Warlock table).

mechanics.details: The character gains 2 Warlock cantrips at level 1. The total number of cantrips known increases based on the Warlock class table at later levels. The choice is from the Warlock spell list.
mechanics.potential_issues: Relies on the existence and correctness of an external link/reference (`[warlock spell list](#section-warlock-spells)`), which is standard but must be cross-validated if this were part of a larger system integration.
